sourceInterpretation.userClarification: STACC config means the BZK security/pool/listing path, not the CSDM 267 SOL scale preset.
whatCanBeReplicated: authority-owned Whirlpool config and pool setup
cash source adapter that accepts only external SOL/USDC inflows or collectable protocol/LP fees
whatCannotBeCountedAsCash: self-volume used only to make a chart look active

bzkSecurityState.tokenBadgeRequirementInterpretation: TokenBadge is not required for a legacy SPL mint; Orca docs require TokenBadge for selected Token-2022/restricted cases.

localCashEvidence.note: These are read-only historical receipts. They prove the path shape; they are not a current spendable-profit receipt.

referenceStaccTx.interpretationOf100k: A 100k flash/borrow simulation passing only proves MarginFi capacity and transaction mechanics. CashRelay still needs post-settlement SOL/USDC growth.

eligibilityProof: WzMa controls Whirlpool fee/protocol authorities for the decoded BZK config.
External BZK route exists in local Helius receipts.
Pump/PumpSwap/Jupiter historical receipts show direct SOL inflows to WzMa.
instructionPathOptions: collect_protocol_fees_v2 from the BZK Whirlpool when protocolFeeOwedA/B > costs
collect LP fees/decrease-liquidity only if owned position NFT proves fee ownership
sell already-owned BZK via Pump/Jupiter only if quote + simulation settle into more SOL/USDC than inventory basis and costs
settlementPathToSolUsdc: BZK/fee token -> Jupiter/Pump/Raydium route -> SOL or USDC
write CashRelay source receipt with beforeRaw/afterRaw on the receiving SOL/USDC account
reject if only BZK balance, chart volume, or T22 withheld amount increases

cashProofGate.reason: This plan proves the STACC/BZK mechanism shape only. It becomes cash when a fresh source scan emits SOL/USDC afterRaw > beforeRaw after all costs.

rejections: this is still a no-send plan; live execution requires a fresh exact sim and explicit approval
nextRequiredExactBuild: Build the BZK fee/source scanner against the decoded pool and WzMa authorities.
Only collect/sell if exact simulation shows SOL/USDC net increase.
Use the 100k flash setting only as execution capacity; do not book it as revenue.
